title: Setup and Configuration
description: Single-file PHP installer (datadog-setup.php) for the Datadog PHP tracing library. Contains one formal class (IniRecord) and a large set of procedural functions grouped by responsibility. Handles install, uninstall, and INI config management across Linux/Windows, multiple PHP binaries, and multiple SAPIs.

classes.name: IniRecord
methods: + println(): void  // echoes 'setting = value; default: X, binary: Y, INI file: Z'
classes.notes: Value-object populated by config_list(). Represents one datadog.* INI entry found in an active INI file for a given PHP binary.

classes.name: Installer
classes.notes: Top-level entry point + install/uninstall workflow. No class wrapper — pure procedural PHP.
methods: + main(): void  // dispatches: install | uninstall | cmd_config_get | cmd_config_set | cmd_config_list
+ install(array $options): void  // downloads tar.gz, extracts, copies .so extensions, writes 98-ddtrace.ini
+ uninstall(array $options): void  // comments out extension= lines, deletes .so files
+ download(string $url, string $dest, bool $retry=false): bool  // tries ext-curl → curl CLI → file_get_contents → PowerShell
+ safe_copy_extension(string $src, string $dest): void  // copy+rename to avoid segfault on live PHP process
+ get_architecture(): string  // uname -m on Linux; PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE on Windows
+ is_alpine(): bool  // reads /etc/os-release
+ check_library_prerequisite_or_exit(string $lib): void  // ldconfig -p | grep or find /usr/lib
+ check_php_ext_prerequisite_or_exit(string $binary, string $ext): void

classes.name: OptionsParser
methods: + parse_validate_user_options(): array  // returns {cmd, opts} normalized array
+ parse_cli_arguments(array $argv=null): array|false  // tokenizes --long, -s, DD_ENV=val
+ map_env_to_ini(string $env): string|null  // DD_TRACE_X → datadog.trace.x
+ print_help(): void
+ print_error_and_exit(string $msg, bool $printHelp=false): never
+ print_warning(string $msg): void

classes.name: BinaryFinder
classes.notes: Discovers PHP binaries on the system or validates user-provided ones.
methods: + require_binaries_or_exit(array $options): array<string,string>  // command→fullPath map
+ search_php_binaries(string $prefix=''): array  // searches $PATH + known paths; Remi Safe, Plesk
+ pick_binaries_interactive(array $options, array $binaries): array  // interactive stdin selection
+ resolve_command_full_path(mixed $cmd): string|false  // which / where
+ build_known_command_names_matrix(): string[]  // php, php8, php82, php-fpm8.2, …
+ get_supported_php_versions(): string[]

classes.name: IniFileManager
classes.notes: All operations on php.ini / conf.d *.ini files.
methods: + ini_values(string $binary): array  // runs 'php -i', extracts PHP_VER, INI_MAIN, INI_SCANDIR, EXTENSION_DIR, THREAD_SAFETY, PHP_API, IS_DEBUG
+ find_all_ini_files(array $phpProps): string[]  // scans INI_SCANDIR; handles Debian SAPI split (cli/apache2/fpm); 98-ddtrace.ini first
+ find_main_ini_files(array $phpProps): string[]  // returns the 'default' ddtrace INI file path(s)
+ filter_ssi_ini_paths(array $paths): array  // excludes datadog-apm-library-php SSI paths
+ add_missing_ini_settings(string $file, array $settings, array $replacements): void  // appends missing datadog.* entries
+ modify_ini_file(string $file, callable $cb): void  // read → transform → write if changed
+ update_ini_setting(array $setting, string $file, bool $promoteComment): false|int  // regex replace in INI file
+ parse_ini_setting(string $raw): false|array{0:string,1:string}  // 'name=val' → ['name','val']
+ get_ini_settings(string $srcDir, string $appsecHelper, string $appsecRules): array  // master list of all datadog.* INI entries with defaults/descriptions

classes.name: ConfigCommands
methods: + config_list(array $options): array<string,IniRecord>  // iterates binaries→INI files→parse_ini_file, builds IniRecord objects
+ cmd_config_list(array $options): void  // calls config_list() then IniRecord::println() for each
+ cmd_config_get(array $options): void  // filters config_list() results by -d settings
+ cmd_config_set(array $options): void  // for each -d 'name=val': update_ini_setting (active→commented→append)

key_relationships: ConfigCommands creates IniRecord  // config_list() instantiates new IniRecord(), sets all 5 fields
ConfigCommands depends_on IniFileManager  // calls find_all_ini_files(), get_ini_settings()
Installer depends_on IniFileManager  // calls ini_values(), find_main_ini_files(), add_missing_ini_settings(), get_ini_settings()
OptionsParser used_by Installer  // main() calls parse_validate_user_options() first
OptionsParser used_by ConfigCommands  // options array threaded through all commands

key_constants.INI_SCANDIR: 'Scan this dir for additional .ini files'  // key for ini_values() result
key_constants.RELEASE_URL_PREFIX: GitHub releases URL prefix, overridable via DD_TEST_INSTALLER_REPO env
key_constants.CMD_CONFIG_NUM_SHIFT: 3  // number of extension= items to skip in config commands
key_constants.OPT_*: CLI option name constants: install-dir, extension-dir, php-bin, ini, file, uninstall, enable-appsec, enable-profiling, d

important_notes: IniRecord is the ONLY formal class; everything else is procedural functions.
Default INI file written is '98-ddtrace.ini' inside the PHP scan directory.
Debian-based systems: INI directories are split by SAPI (cli/apache2/fpm); installer handles all three.
INI setting management: 3-step cascade — update active → promote commented → append new.
DD_INSTRUMENT_SERVICE_WITH_APM=false is explicitly set to prevent APM auto-injection during install.
Cross-platform: IS_WINDOWS runtime flag drives path separators, archive extraction tool selection, binary search strategy.
config_list() returns array<setting_name, IniRecord>; cmd_config_get groups by setting to show multiple files.
map_env_to_ini() allows DD_TRACE_ENABLED style env vars to be used as INI setting names in config set.
